Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time between Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE after the execution of Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE following a rejection by any approver (e.g., ADMINISTRATION, PRE_APPROVER, SUPERVISOR, BUDGET OWNER)
Metric: the average of the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' or `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' or `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' or `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time from Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE in variants that include re-submission cycles
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE to be done after Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time from Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE in cases that eventually lead to successful Payment Handled versus those that terminate without payment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case where activity 'Payment Handled occurs

Name: Minimum time between Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE in variants containing multiple rejection loops
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE when preceded by Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time until Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE is performed in variants that start with Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and end without Request Payment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE in domestic declaration cases versus pre-paid travel cost cases, inferred from case attributes
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE and the end of the case

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE after the execution of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in high-amount claims (case:Amount > median)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'", 'end': "activity == 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'filter': 'case:Amount > median'}"
